*** 1 FATAL *** ***Delayed Report*** Large warehouse facility near 47th Ave and Van Buren St was destroyed with multiple walls collapsed and portion of roof missing. One person was killed as a result of the collapse. Wind speeds were estimated by radar to be up to 70-80 mph.

*** 1 FATAL *** ***UPDATE*** Large warehouse facility collapsed with multiple walls and portion of roof missing. A person was trapped under the rubble and found deceased 2.5 days later by the search and rescue operations team. Time of damage estimated by radar.
